js/locales/en/ui_en.json — English UI strings. All user-facing strings from the app shell. Keys follow the convention: {file_or_feature}_{description}. Strings with {placeholders} use t(key, { var: value }) interpolation.
appinit_restore_study_error: Wawaa addude janngirde maa sakkitiire. Ɗo'o ɗo'on, defterdu ndu udditete.
main_no_study_body: Walaa no ngar-ɗaa suɓaade janngirde Biibal. Njehe e defterdu maa ngam fuɗɗaade.
modals_likert_rotate_tip: 💡 Hakkiilo: ngartina na'ura maa ngam yi'ugo ma'auni o ɓurɗo laaɓugo.
modals_notes_info_body:
Huutoro ɗo'o ngam kala ko waawaa huutoreede e nder lamndooɗi:

• Miijooji hoore maa dow dewo

• Bayaney ɗi ngamta-ɗaa wakkati yeewtere

• Bayaney du'aare ɗi binndol Biibal waɗi maa

• Lamndooɗi ɗi ngartat-ɗaa e ardiiɗo

Bayaney ɗiin ɗon nder wakkati ko huutor-ɗaa maɓɓugal Yeewtere (Share) ngam dewo o.
onboarding_app_slide1_body:
Janngirde Biibal ɗuuɗɗe ɗon ɗo'o ɗen ɗon ɗe mari koo'e maaje.
  • Kala janngirde ko darasa timmuɗo e nder maaje woodi biibal, lamndooɗi, e miijooji hoore.
  • Jang, miijoo, e binnda jaabawol maa.
  • Jaabawol maa ɗon moofta e nyannde wakkati ko binndat-ɗaa.
  • Jaabawol maa waawaa ɗon jaaboreede e nyannde (ɗum ko tawaye), maa tan wakkati ko ngara-ɗaa e maɓɓugal. Ngartinon ɗum nder saituna.
onboarding_app_slide2_body:
Wakkati ɗo'o fuɗɗoode udditata, maa yi'a Defterdu — koɓa janngirde fuu ngam uddita.
  • Janngirde ɓurɗe ɗuuɗugo ɗon ɗo'o ngam download diga Load e nder defterdu.
  • Janngirde ɗon ngara e nder .estudy — ɗum waawaa ɗon huutoreede diga na'ura maa si ngoni e ɗum.
onboarding_app_slide3_body:
Patal No huutortoo ɗon wolwa e kala ko fayti e.
  • Koɓa e icon ? nder mawɗo kewayawa e dow e kala wakkati.
Jooni njahot-ɗen e Defterdu ngam suɓa janngirde e fuɗɗaade!
onboarding_starring_slide1_body: Koɓa icon tauraro e kowee card lamndooɗi ngam waɗde ɗum alama. Lamndooɗi ɗi woodi tauraro ɗon mari koɗol kaŋŋe ngam ɗi feeñta wakkati ko ɗon golloto-ɗaa e nder dewo o.
onboarding_starring_slide2_body: Kala lamndooɗi maa ɗi woodi tauraro ɗon feeñta nder shafi taƙaitawa e dow dewo o — e nder Binge Yeeso (Progress Overview). Ɗum woodi nafa ngam yeewtere kawtal maa yeewtere hoore.
onboarding_search_slide1_body: Koɓa icon widitugo nder maɓɓugal dow ngam widitugo kala lamndooɗi nder janngirde kadi — e kala ko binndi-ɗaa nder nokkuure jaabawol maa.
onboarding_search_slide2_body: Kala kadi ɗon holla lamndooɗi e jaabawol maa tikkere. Koɓa kala kadi ngam yahugo feere e dewo o e lamndooɗi ɗin.
onboarding_sharing_slide1_body: Koɓa Yeewtere (Share) e les kowee dewo ngam neldugo jaabawol dewo o dow WhatsApp, email, maa kowee app goɗɗo nder waya maa.
onboarding_sharing_slide2_heading: Yeewta Kala Ko e Wakkati Gooto
onboarding_sharing_slide2_body: Ngam yeewtugo kala jaabawol maa e wakkati gooto, yaha e Saituna → Janngirde → Bayaney → Yeewta kala jaabawol. Ɗo'o woodi kadi zaɓin Buga / eksport kala dewo ngam mooftugo e PDF.
onboarding_sharing_slide3_body:
Yaha e Saituna → App → Mooftugo & Yeewtere → No yeewteretee.

'WhatsApp Formatted' ɗon waɗa bold marker ɗi WhatsApp ɗon holla bana bold. 'Plain Text' ɗon laaɓi ngam email. A waaway laataade ɗum e kala wakkati.
onboarding_myprogress_slide1_body: Koɓa icon yeeso e maɓɓugal dow ngam uddita Binge Yeeso — koɗol no lamndooɗi ɗuuɗi ɗi jaabi-ɗaa e nder kowee dewo, e zobe timminki ngam janngirde fuu.
onboarding_myprogress_slide2_body: Kala lamndooɗi maa ɗi woodi tauraro diga kowee dewo ɗon kawtetee nder Binge Yeeso — ngam a waaway yeewtugo ko ɓuri woodugo nafa e nder janngirde fuu.
onboarding_voiceinput_slide1_body: Icon makirufo ɗon feeñta nder nokkuure jaabawol dow na'uraji ɗi wallitete. Koɓa ɗum ngam maande jaabawol maa e murya — ɗum woodi nafa wakkati binndol dow screen ɓiɗɗo ɗon ladde.
onboarding_voiceinput_slide2_body: Wola bana no ɗon wola-ɗaa e ɗakka jooni kafin koɓa tamma. Binndol ɗi murya waɗi ɗon feeñta nder nokkuure jaabawol kadi ɗon waawi lattetee. Ɗon gollira e nder kala ɗemngal ɗi na'ura maa wallitete.
onboarding_readaloud_slide1_body: Icon lasifika e dow nassoshi Biibal kadi e dow faifan bayaney ɗon hokkata app o jannge ɗum e murya — ɗum woodi nafa ngam accessibility, ngam nanjugo wakkati ɗon yahata, maa tan ngam no feere e no ɗon gollira e binndol.
onboarding_readaloud_slide2_body:
Yaha e Saituna → App → Jannge e Murya ngam suɓaade: Hay gooto, Nassoshi ɗuuɗi tan, maa Kullum.

Saituna ɗo'o ɗon mari bukata Advanced interface mode.
onboarding_biblepopups_slide1_body: Kala to ɗon yi'a-ɗaa icon bayaney ɓiɗɗo kusa e nassi Biibal, koɓa ɗum ngam jannge nassi ɗin e nder faifan — baa woppugo lamndooɗi ɗi ɗon golloto-ɗaa.
onboarding_notesarea_slide1_body: Kowee dewo woodi nokkuure ɓinndol e les — ngam kala ko ɗon nder lamndooɗi ɗi tsari: miijooji hoore, ko ɗon ƴeewta, lamndooɗi ngam addugo e kawtal maa.
onboarding_notesarea_slide2_body:
Bayaney maa ɗon nder Yeewtere kadi PDF ɗi eksport — ngam hay gooto ɗon woppa.

Hakkiilo: koɓa e nokkuure jaabawol (ha e Bayaney) ngam koppide ko ɗon nder.
onboarding_autosave_slide1_body:
App o ɗon moofta jaabawol maa e wakkati kala ɗon ɗakka diga nokkuure — ngam ɗum a woodi bukata mooftugo.

Button 'Moofta' e les kowee shafi ɗon hokkata a mooftugo e ɗiɗaɓo si ɗon yi'a-ɗaa.
onboarding_interfacemode_slide1_body:
App o ɗon mari yanayi tati: 'Basic', 'Intermediate', e 'Advanced'. 'Basic' ɗon hokkata aɗa gollora e no laaɓi. Yanayi goɗɗo ɗon uddita ko ɓuri ɗuuɗugo.

A waaway lattugo e kala wakkati — hay goɗɗo ɗon majja.
onboarding_interfacemode_slide2_body: Tamma to ngartin-mi · Font janngugol · Jaajirɗe nokkuure jaabawol · Shafi Yeeso Am · Shafi Bayaney & Komen · Bayaney Ardiiɗo · Saituna Defterdu · App Updates
onboarding_interfacemode_slide3_body:
Salon icon · Button Yeeso/Sakkitiire · Sanarwa mooftugo e wakkati · Salon yeewtere · Sarrafa Jannge e Murya · No huutortoo e toggle shafi About

Yi'a Yanayin Interface e les Saituna → App.
onboarding_library_slide1_body: Memnu alaama Defterdu (dow-nanngo) ngam yi'ude jannguuji maa fof. Memnu kadi janngol ngol njiɗ-ɗaa ngam janngude ngol. Jaabiiji maa e kala janngol ina njiidira kureeji mum.
onboarding_library_slide2_body: Memnu "Naattingol Janngol" les njannguuji ngam naattingol fiilde .estudy. So naatii, ngol janngol ina wonda e doggol maa duumiingol kadi aɗa waawi udditde ngol kala nde njiɗ-ɗaa.
onboarding_library_slide3_body:
Memnu alaama 🗑️ dow kaardu janngol ngam ittugol ngol.

Ɗum ina momta janngol ngol e jaabiiji maa fof — feew. Wuurtin (Export) walla renndin jaabiiji maa so aɗa yiɗi moolde ɗum.
onboarding_progressbar_slide1_body:
Diidol koyngol ngol les njannguuji dow ngol ina hollira huunde e naamne ɗe njaabii-ɗaa e tayre nde ngon-ɗaa jooni. Ngal ina feyyina so a resii.

Aɗa waawi udditde walla udde ngal e Fattude (Settings) → App → Appearance → Hollo bara yaadu.
onboarding_swipenav_slide1_body: Dottu (Swipe) nano ngam yaha tayre garoore, ñaamo ngam tayre ɓennunde. Aɗa waawi kadi huutoraade butoŋaaji 'Garoore / Ɓennunde' les tayre (ɗum ina waawi hollireede walla suuɗeede e Fattude).
onboarding_swipenav_slide2_body: So dottugol ngol ina weeɓi no feewi — walla ina tiiɗi — yaho Fattude → App → Navigation → Swipe Sensitivity kadi cuɓoo: Les, Hakkunde, walla Dow.
onboarding_rememberpos_slide1_body:
Uddit "Siftor nokku am" e Fattude ngam hootde e tayre maa sakitiinde so a udditii app oo.

Ina ɓeyda kadi butoŋ 'Yahu yeeso' → dow Hello tiitoonde ngam a jokkiri ɗo keddi-ɗaa.

Ɗum ina ɗaɓɓi kuutorgal 'Intermediate' walla ko ɓuri ɗum.
onboarding_leadersnotes_slide1_body: Binndi Horeeɓe ina rokka horeeɓe pelle e wasiyooɓe kumpital — kuule janngol e binndi dow geɗe kelɗe e kala tayre.
onboarding_leadersnotes_slide2_body:
Yaho Fattude → App → Optional Pages → Binndi Horeeɓe kadi uddita ngol.

Ɗum ina ɗaɓɓi kuutorgal 'Intermediate'. So udditii, Binndi Horeeɓe ina feeñi e doggol Contents.
onboarding_answercheck_slide1_body:
Alaama ƴeewndo tokooso ina feeña nano-ñaamo e kaardu naamne ɗe ƴeewtetee. Memnu ngal ngam ƴeewde jaabi maa ko aldaa e internet — ngal ina ƴeewa njuuteendi, potal, e so jaabi maa ina jokkondiri e binndol ngol.

Aldaa e internet. Walaa ko neltetee nokku goɗɗo.
onboarding_answercheck_slide2_body: E Junngo (Manual), ƴeewndo ngol ina yaha tan so a memii alaama oo — mbele aɗa jogii doole nde njiɗ-ɗaa heɓde kumpital. Memnu alaama oo kala nde njiɗ-ɗaa ɓaawo winndude jaabi maa.
onboarding_answercheck_slide3_body: E Hoore mum (Auto), ƴeewndo ngol ina yaha kala nde jaabi maa resii — tan so a waylitii jaabi maa ɓaawo ƴeewndo sakitiingo, mbele ngal yahaa laabi ɗiɗi e binndol gootol. Waylu hakkunde Junngo e Hoore mum e Fattude → App → Ƴeewndo Jaabi.
renderchapter_answer_tools_mic_desc: memnu ngam haalde jaabi maa e sawtu e batte winndude. Feeñata tan so kuutorgal maa ina jaɓa sawtu.
renderchapter_answer_tools_localvalidate: ina yaha ƴeewndo jaabi maa ko aldaa e internet. E Junngo aɗa mema ɗum; e Hoore mum ina yaha ɓaawo kala resngo. Aɗa waawi waylude ɗum e Fattude.
renderchapter_answer_tools_aichat_desc: jannginoowo AI mo suɓetee ngam hokkude kumpital dow jaabi maa. Ina uddaa; udditu ɗum e Fattude.
renderchapter_eyebrow_info_body:
Memnu alaama ☆ dow kaardu naamnal ngam waɗde ɗum hoodere. Naamne jogiiɗe hoodere ina peeña e mbaydi kaŋŋe kadi ina ngenndina e hello toɓɓere dow tayre ndee, mbele aɗa heɓa naamne ɗe njiɗ-ɗaa hootde walla waɗde yeewtere dow mum. Ɗum kadi ina feeña e Progress Overview maa.

Memnu alaama mikrofoŋ nder kala nokku jaabi ngam haalde jaabi maa e sawtu e batte winndude. Alaama oo feeñata tan so kuutorgal maa ina jaɓa sawtu.

Diidol koyngol les njannguuji dow ngol woni bara yaadu tayre maa — ngal ina hebbina nde njaaboto-ɗaa naamne e ndee tayre.

Jaabiiji maa ina nuresa e hoore mum so a ruttii ɓaawo nokku jaabi — a suulaaki waɗde hay huunde. Butoŋ Resu (Save) ina woodi so aɗa yiɗi resude e junngo, hono nde njiɗ-ɗaa renndinde jaabiiji maa.
renderlib_all_empty_body: Yahu ha cuɓirgal 'Loowu' (Load) ngam loowugo .estudy mbele a fuɗɗa.
renderlib_recent_empty_body: Janngugol ngol udditta fof natti ha ɗo ngam heɓugo ɗum jaawɗum.
renderlib_shelves_empty_body: Loowu janngirle ngam yi'ugo ɗum fecciraa e kagaaji.
renderlib_shelves_intro: Janngirle ma loowaaɗe ɗon feccira ha kagaaji dow jigooji — Ahdi Kiindi e Ahdi Kesiri, Tawhiidi, Ngendam, Kuugal Allah, e ko nanndi heen. Huuturu kagaaji ngam yi'ugo ko njogi-ɗaa.
renderlib_shelves_popup_body:
Nde loowu-ɗaa janngugol Linjiila, ngol ɗon holla kaggal ngol jeyaa — misaalu "Ahdi Kiindi", "Tawhiidi", malla "Ngendam". Kagaaji ɗon huutura waatiraaji ɗon ngam feccugo ko loowu-ɗaa fof ha nokkuure woore.

A waawan rabaade e kagaaji ngam yi'ugo ko njogi-ɗaa, malla a huutura ɗum ngam yi'ugo ko lutta-ɗaa e janngugol ma.

Meemu kowne tiitoonde janngugol ngam udditugo ɗum kisan. To kaggal ɗon holla feccere (bana "Tawreeta" malla "Linjiilaaji"), huuturu Uddit fof ngam yi'ugo janngirle gooto-gooto.

Kagaaji ɗi walaa janngugol hollataa. To a yiɗi yi'ugo ɗum, a waawan jaɓugo ɗum ha Saituna/Laburare.
renderlib_paths_intro: Labi janngugol woni dental janngirle Linjiila mbele a heɓa faamu e ko janngata-ɗaa, sannan ngol ɗon walla ma a tokka yaadu ma.
renderlib_paths_popup_body:
Labi janngugol woni dental janngirle Linjiila ngol fecciraa ngam hokkugo ma faamu manngu e yaadu kawtungal. E dow a jannga jigooji feere-feere, laawol ɗon ɗowata ma yaadu kawtungal — wallugo ma a mahu dow ko njanngu-ɗaa.

Kowne laawol anniya mum woni dental janngirle diga Ahdi Kiindi, Ahdi Kesiri, Tawhiidi, Ngendam, e Kuugal Allah. Ɗum ɗon holla wonde kowne laawol tokku-ɗaa, a janngan jigooji feere-feere diga Binndol Allah.

Ngam fuɗɗugo jaawɗum, mi dentini janngirle fof ha fayil zip gooto. Meemu alaama jippinol kusaŋ e laawol ngam jippingo e loowugo fof kisan.
renderlib_paths_hidden_note: Feccere {count} {count, plural, one{gootel} other{feere}} e nder laawol ngol hollataa ɗo. Ngam yi'ugo ɗum fof, yahu Saituna → Laburare sannan ɓeydu limre 'Paths'.
renderlib_study_not_available: Janngugol ngol walaa tawan, ammaa min ɗon kuuɗe dow mum ngam wakkati garoowo.
renderlib_pathway_not_available: Laawol ngol walaa tawan, ammaa min ɗon kuuɗe dow mum ngam wakkati garoowo.
renderlib_try_this_heading:
A anndaa toy a fuɗɗata?
Fuɗɗu ɗo!
renderpages_newhere_hasstudy_body: So aɗa yiɗi nande kabaaru janngde ndee ko adii nde a fuɗɗata, mem butoŋ les oo. O nannitay ma kabaaruuji puɗɗorgal janngde {studyTitle} ndee.
renderpages_newhere_nostudy_body: Walaa janngde loowaande tawo. Yaho suudu defte ngam loowde janngde — app oo firtanay ma ko foti waɗeede sa'aa mo a udditi ɗum ko adii.
renderpages_newhere_appslides_prompt: So aɗa yiɗi nannitugo kabaaruuji puɗɗorgal app oo, mem butoŋ oo:
renderpages_topbar_library_desc: Mem alaama guddun nano oo ngam udditugo Suudu defte ma — doggol janngdeeji ɗi loow-ɗaa. Gila ɗon a waaway waylude janngde walla loowde hesre.
renderpages_topbar_search_desc: Mem alaama yeewtu oo ngam yeewtugo ley naamne e jaabawuuli ma ɗi njippini-ɗaa e janngde jooni ndee.
renderpages_topbar_progress_desc: Mem alaama yahdu yeeso oo ngam udditugo kabaaru yahdu yeeso — limre naamne ɗe njaabi-ɗaa e kala babi, e alaama timmungal janngde ndee fof.
renderpages_topbar_howto_desc: Mem alaama 'No kuutorto-ɗaa' ngam udditugo hello ngoo. Ngo firtata no keɓir-taa nafa e janngde ndee e kuuraaji app oo.
renderpages_topbar_settings_desc: Mem alaama kuwolji ngam udditugo Kuwolji. Kuuɗe mawɗe: Mawnuki binndol, Mbiru (Dark Mode), kure memdugal, toowki huɓeere jaabawol, e no sartir-taa.
renderpages_topbar_contents_desc: Mem butoŋ kabaaruuji ngam udditugo doggol babooji fof. Mem kala babi ngam yottugo ɗon kisin. Babooji ɗi njaabi-ɗaa ina mawnira ✓.
renderpages_topbar_progressbar_desc: Diidol goolngol e les bar dow oo ina holla limre naamne ɗe njaabi-ɗaa e babi jooni oo. A waaway udditugo ɗum walla maɓɓugo e Kuwolji.
renderpages_topbar_gotosettings_body: A waaway waylude mawnuki binndol, mbiru hello, e goɗɗum e hello Kuwolji.
renderpages_chapters_biblepopup_desc: To a yi'i alaama kabaaru pamaro e sara 'reference', mem ɗum ngam janngugo aaya oo e huɓeere fiiltorde. Kala aayeeji ɗon ngumni e 'NET Bible'.
renderpages_chapters_starring_desc: Mem alaama hoodere dow kala naamnal ngam waɗude ɗum hoodere. Naamne ɗe ngadda-ɗaa hoodere ina mawnira noo-kaane e ina nji'oo e dow babi oo.
renderpages_chapters_notes_desc: Nokku winndugo e les kala babi ngam winndugo ko yidi fof ko jeydaaka e naamne ɗee. Ina jeyaa e ko sartir-taa.
renderpages_chapters_save_desc: Mem Moolu ngam njippinugo jaabawuuli ma. App oo kadi ina moolira hoore mum so a fiti e huɓeere jaabawol.
renderpages_chapters_print_desc: Mem alaama moolgol ngam moolugo babi walla njippinugo no PDF e jaabawuuli ma.
renderpages_chapters_share_desc: Mem Sartu les babi oo ngam neldugo jaabawuuli ma e WhatsApp walla email.
renderpages_chapters_voice_desc: Mem alaama 'microphone' ley huɓeere jaabawol ngam haalugo jaabawol ma — ɗum ina walla so aɗa kuutortoo mobayel.
renderpages_chapters_answercheck_desc: Mem alaama yeewtu dow naamne ngam yeewtugo jaabawol ma tawa a walaa e 'internet'.
renderpages_chapters_readaloud_desc: Alaama 'speaker' dow aayeeji juutɗi ina adda app oo janngugo ɗum e daande toownde.
renderpages_chapters_navbtns_desc: Butoŋoji Caggal e Yeeso e les babi fof. A waaway kadi memde nano/nyaamo ngam waylude babi.
renderpages_chapters_other_desc: Won e janngdeeji ina njogii kuwolji goɗɗi — bana 'questionnaires' walla hellooji Luggiɗin kabaaru. A faamay ɗum so a yi'ii ɗum.
renderpages_library_loading_body: Meemu alaama defterdu to bannge nano dow ngam udditugo Defterdu mon. Si on heɓii fiisiyee .estudy, meemu Naattingol Janngugol (Load Study) to les masiin mon ngam naatingo ɗum. Janngugol ngol feenyat e doggol mon, on mbeeman udditugo ngol sa'a kala.
renderpages_library_switching_body: Jannguɗe fof ɗe on naatni mbeeman feenyugo e nder Defterdu ndu. Meemu gootal ngam udditugo ɗum. Jaabolji mon e nder janngugol kala ana mbeema loowugo feere-feere.
renderpages_library_removing_body: Ngam ittugo janngugol e nder Defterdu ndu, meemu alaama 🗑️ to dow katin mum. Ɗum ittan janngugol ngol e jaabolji mon fof ɗe on ndisni. Tabbintinee on njiilti (share) walla on murtini (print) jaabolji mon gila on nattay ittugo ɗum si on njiɗi fabaago ɗum.
renderpages_sharing_chapter_body: To les bumburi kala, meemu Hokkugol (Share) ngam neldugo jaabolji mon to bumburi ndu e WhatsApp, imel, walla e porogaraamuuji goɗɗi to masiin mon. Ɗum woni laawol booɗngol ngam hollugo golle mon to kardo dental walla to ballo'o mon gila on nattay dental.
renderpages_sharing_all_body: Ngam neldugo jaabolji bumburiiji fof kile gootal, njehee to Keɓe → Janngugol → Habaruuji → Hokkugol jaabolji fof. Ɗum haɓɓan habaruuji ɗin fof e nder mbeewa gootal.
renderpages_sharing_print_body: Meemu alaama 🖸 to dow bumburi kala ngam murtingol walla loowugo PDF bumburi ndu e jaabolji mon. Ngam murtingol bumburiiji fof kile gootal, njehee to Keɓe → Janngugol → Habaruuji → Murtingol bumburiiji fof.
renderpages_sharing_format_body: E nder Keɓe (Settings) on mbeeman suɓugo hakkunde WhatsApp Formatted (mbinndi ɓulɗi ɗi WhatsApp feenyinta) walla Plain Text (mbinndi meere, ɗum ɓuri booɗugo to imel). On mbeeman waylitugo ɗum sa'a kala.
renderpages_shareapp_know_title: On anndi neɗɗo mo ɗum nafa?
renderpages_shareapp_know_body: Si on miijake won mo janngugol ngol nafa — yidiraaɗo, neɗɗo saare, walla neɗɗo e nder kaniisa mon — on mbeeman hokkugo ɗum mahol (link) porogaraamu ndu tawa on nolliri butoŋ mo woni to les ɗo.
renderpages_shareapp_download_intro: On mbeeman kadi loowugo porogaraamu ndu mbeemee naatiningol ɗum to masiin Android. Fiisiyee zip woni mo fabaama e lambawol sirri — ni'i on ngollirta ɗum:
renderpages_shareapp_download_step1: Meemu butoŋ mo woni to les ngam loowugo fiisiyee zip to Google Drive.
renderpages_shareapp_download_step2: Uddit fiisiyee on tawa a naatni lambawol sirri: 1234
renderpages_shareapp_download_note: (Sabu lambawol sirri ndu woni Google Drive ana fadda fiisiyeeji .apk; lambawol + zip ana ɗowta ɗum.)
renderpages_leaders_confidential: Ɗum woni ko taskanaa ardiiɓe dental e ballo'en
renderpages_copyright_licence_link: Ngam yi'ugo ɗerewol lasis ndu, njehee to creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0.
renderpages_copyright_share_entry: Share: kopyugol e hokkugol kuuje ɗin e kowee kile walla e mbinndi fof.
renderpages_copyright_adapt_entry: Adapt: jillugo, waylitugo, e gollirgal dow kuuje ɗin ngam kowee kile fof, kadi e gollirgal kasu.
renderpages_copyright_attribution_entry: Attribution: A foti hokkugo binndoowo on teddungal mum, a hokkan mahol lasis on, kadi a hollan si won ko a wayliti.
renderpages_copyright_sharealike_entry: ShareAlike: Si a jilliti, walla a wayliti, walla a golli dow kuuje ɗin, a foti hokkugol kabaaruuji ma to les lasis gootal e lasis asali on.
renderpages_settings_textsize_preview: Peewɗo wuurnitoto ko e goonɗinal. Ko danyiɗo e Ruuhu ko ruuhu.
renderpages_settings_darkmode_desc: Ina weeɓi e gite so annoore famɗi
renderpages_settings_rememberplace_desc: So a fuɗɗitii, hootu feccere sakkitorde nde njanŋatno-ɗaa. Hollu kadi butoŋ 'Jokkunu' e hello tiitoonde.
renderpages_settings_readingfont_desc: Suɓo mbinndi kuutorteeɗi e winndande janŋde ndee fof
renderpages_settings_iconstyle_desc: Suɓo mbaadi natal kuutorteengal e nder app o. Ina fuɗɗa gollude so a feewni kadi.
renderpages_settings_answercheck_desc:
E juuɗe — natal ndika jaabi ina feeña e kartonji naamne; tappu ngal so a njiɗii humpito.

Heeri — humpito ina gollira kadi so jaabi aaftaama (so a hoɗtii), kono so jaabi o wayliima gila ndika sakkitorde.
renderpages_settings_navbtns_desc: Hollu butoŋoji yiilaade e les kofol feccere fof
renderpages_settings_swipe_desc: Mawnugo goggal juuɗe ngal njiɗ-ɗaa mbele feccere ndee ina wayla
renderpages_settings_answerbox_desc: Tooweendi nokku jaabi o so a fuɗɗaaki mbinndol
renderpages_settings_myprogress_desc: Hello dentinaango holloowo no naamne njaabor-ɗaa e feccere fof, e mbeebit timgol.
renderpages_settings_notes_desc: Hello binndol tawa ɗum woni caggal Feccere 9, wonande miijooji ɗi ngonaa e feccere tigi. Kabaruuji ina aaftee so hello ngal momtaama; ina feeña kadi so ngal artiraama.
renderpages_settings_leaders_desc: Ɓeydude ardungal wonande ardiiɓe dental, e haalaaji janŋde e binnditanji wonande feccere fof.
renderpages_settings_howto_desc: Naatgol e app o — no njanŋir-ɗaa janŋde ndee no moƴƴi, no naamne ɗee ngollirta, e ardungal golle app o.
renderpages_settings_about_desc: Caggal janŋde ndee — darnde mum, faandu mum, e binnduɗo ɗum.
renderpages_settings_autosave_desc: Hollu jaɓgol so jaabawuuji aaftaama e hoore mum
renderpages_settings_shareformat_desc: WhatsApp Formatted ina ɓeyda mbinndi ɓuuti wonande WhatsApp. Plain Text ina moƴƴi wonande e-mail.
renderpages_settings_readaloud_desc: Tappu natal haalanoowo e njanŋuwal mbele ina janŋee e daande. Suɓo nde natal ngal feeñata.
renderpages_settings_answerbtn_desc: Hollu butoŋ ndika AI malal e kartonji naamne
renderpages_settings_appupdates_body:
App o nani jooni e Google Play (kono ina wara jooni). Jooni noon:

  • Google Drive: Kesi ina mbaawi yaltineede tigi e Google Drive.
  • Zipped: Sabu Google Drive ina huli fayiloji APK, fayil o ina nder zip tawa ina jogii kalmar sirri.
  • Kalmar sirri: Kalmar sirri o ko 1234.

Mbele aɗa hesɗitina:

  1. Tappu butoŋ les mbele a yaltina zip o.
  2. Fittu zip o e kuutoragol kalmar sirri: 1234
  3. Uddit APK o mbele a aafta ɗum.

(Sabu kalmar sirri o ko Google Drive ina hollata fayiloji .apk; kalmar sirri + zip ina reenta ɗum.)
renderpages_settings_interfacemode_choos: Suɓo no fasiraaji nji'oto-ɗaa. Aɗa waawi waylude ɗum saa'i fof.
renderpages_settings_mode_basic_desc: janŋde laaɓnde e setturuuji nji'ol tigi.
renderpages_settings_mode_intermediate_d: ina ɓeyda mbinndi njanŋugol, mawnugo suudu jaabi, helloji suɓaaji, Library, e kesi app.
renderpages_settings_wantmore_body: App o ina jogii Mbaadi Interface gonɗo e laamaade no suɓaaji keewi. So a woowii e no app o gollirta, jaribi waylude gila e Neeñal fayde e Hakirde walla Dow. Wayloowo Mbaadi Interface o ina e les hello ngal.
renderpages_settings_shareall_desc: Renndin jaabawuuli maada moftaaɗi e dow kuluuje jeya-nay fuu e nder ɗerewol gootol ngam yebbugo dow WhatsApp, email, malla kowala manhaja.
renderpages_settings_printall_desc: Renndin jaabawuuli maada (bana dow nii) ammaa bee noone ngam wurtinki malla moftugo bana PDF.
renderpages_settings_resetsettings_desc: Ɗum ɗon hootina kuluuje maada (mangu binndi, joonde niɓre, e kanditane feere) bana no ɗum wonnoo arande. Naatigo arande kadi ɗon huuta kadi. Jaabawuuli maada, binndi, yahdu yeeso, e nokkuure nde njahɗa haa janngirde wonataa bee caɗeele.
renderpages_settings_clearwarning_text: Mommugo jaabawuuli maada ko duumiingol on kadi a waawatan hootinki ɗum. Jaabawuuli fuu winndaaɗi e dow kuluuje jeya-nay fuu ɗon mommaa e dow kuutinirteeɗum ɗon. Walaa no mbaawataa hootinki ɗum.
renderpages_settings_clearwarning_sugges: A waaway huutinirgo butoŋaaji Yebba malla Wurtin dow nii ngam moftugo jaabawuuli maada bako a momma ɗum.
renderpages_settings_recent_desc:
Holli janngirɗe ɗe maɓɓit-ɗa kesum.
  • Off — nulaaka sam.
  • >5 — ɗon feeña so a woodi janngirɗe ɓuri 5.
  • On — ɗon holla kulu fuu.
renderpages_settings_shelves_desc:
Holli janngirɗe bee noone muɗum.
  • Off — nulaaka sam.
  • >8 — ɗon feeña so a woodi janngirɗe ɓuri 8.
  • On — ɗon holla kulu fuu.
renderpages_settings_emptyshelves_desc:
Kanditane ngam hollugo kagguuji walaa kulu.
  • Balaa — sengooji e kagguuji meere ɗon cuuɗee fuu.
  • Seɗɗa — sengooji meere nder kagguuji woodi kulu ɗon hollee seɗɗa.
  • Heewi — kagguuji meere e sengooji meere fuu ɗon hollee.
  • Fuu — kagguuji meere, sengooji meere, e sengooji feere meere fuu ɗon hollee.
renderpages_settings_paths_desc:
Holli laabi janngirde bee noone muɗum.
  • Off — nulaaka sam.
  • >2 — ɗon feeña so a woodi janngirɗe ɓuri 2.
  • On — ɗon holla kulu fuu.
renderpages_settings_pathsamount_desc:
Laabi janngirde no foti foti hollugo.
  • Gootol — holli laawol arandeewol tan.
  • Seɗɗa — tiitooɗe dow e tiitoore arandeere kadi.
  • Heewi — tiitooɗe dow e tiitooɗe ɗiɗi arandeeje kadi.
  • Fuu — sengooji fuu ɗon hollee.
renderpages_settings_language_desc: Suɓo ɗemngal kuutorgal app oo. Geɗe janngol maa e jaabiiji maa feyyintaako.
progress_encourage_0: A taskiti ngam fuɗɗugo – nden fuɗɗen.
progress_encourage_24: A fuɗɗi bee jam. Yahdu yeeso!
progress_encourage_39: A ɗon yaha yeeso sosai. Barka bee huuna.
progress_encourage_49: A ɓadii hakkunde – no foti jawdi mbaawataa yahdu ton?
progress_encourage_99: A ɓadii timmungo. A waaway ɗum!
progress_count_no_answers_start: Walaa jaabawuuli moftaaɗi – fuɗɗu bee Sura 1
progress_detail_open_to_start: Udditu ndee janngde ngam fuddugo jokkingo yahdu maa.
progress_notes_placeholder: Winndu huunde kala ɗoo — walaa tambooji jaabateedi kadi walaa jaabol goongal walla mbonngal…
progress_notes_autosave_label: Ina hisna hoore mum nde mbinndataa
progress_notes_info_body:
Ɗum woni nokku mo cuɓi-ɗaa ngam winndugo kala ko mballata walla miijooji ɗi ngalaaka e sura gooto — ko ndaar-ɗaa e suraaji keewɗi, tambooji ɗi njiɗ-ɗaa ruttago mum, ko nan-ɗaa e yeewtere dental, walla huunde kala nde njiɗ-ɗaa siftorgu.

Huttor ɗum no mballir-ɗaa, walla accu ɗum fof so a yiɗii. Ɗum ustaataa yahdu maa e janngde ndee. A waaway udditugo ngoo hello kadi wakkati kala ka Koglowal.

So a udditii ngoo hello, ko mbinndu-ɗaa fof ina hisnaa no haandiri, kadi ina ruttoo so a udditii ɗum kadi.
search_empty_prompt:
Fuddu winndugo ngam dabugo tambooji,
ayaaje, e jaabi maa hisninaaɗi.
settings_clear_answers_body: Ɗum momtay jaabi maa hisninaaɗi fof e ndee janngde haa bada. Ɗum ruttataake.
settings_reset_body:
Ɗum ruttinay koglowal maa fof (mangu mbinndu, ngonka jemma, e ko njiɗ-ɗaa) haa ka puɗɗorgal mum. Kadi yeewtere fuddorde ndee fudday so a udditii kadi.

Jaabi maa, binndi, yahdu maa, e ɗo nattinu-ɗaa janngugo meemataake.
shareprint_no_answers_body: A hisninaani jaabol tawo. Timmin suraaji goɗɗi tawo, ndeen a ruttoo ɗoo ngam yaltingo ɗum.
shareprint_print_fallback_chapter:
{studyTitle} — Ciɓel {number}: {chapterTitle}

(Winnditugo walaa — naftir e Yeeyugo (Share) bo hamma)
shareprint_print_fallback_all: Winnditugo walaa dow kuutinirgal ngal. Naftir e Yeeyugo jaabiiji fof.
studyloader_delete_body: Ɗum momtan janngirde nden e jaabiiji maa fof fof. A yeeyii ko a winnditii gollal maa?
studyloader_version_older: Fayil janngirde nden woni kiiɗɗum. Fayil: v{actual} · App yiɗi: v{expected}. Kesɗitin fayil janngirde nden.
studyloader_version_newer: Fayil janngirde nden woni kesum sanne. Fayil: v{actual} · App yiɗi: v{expected}. Kesɗitin app on.
studyloader_picker_body: Suɓu fayil (.estudy) ngam loduugo ciɓe mum, ƴamɗe mum, e ko woni e nder mum.
studyloader_error_no_study_json: {filename} ko zip ammaa walaa fayil timmiirɗo study.json.
validation_tutor_input_placeholder: Yam ƴamol ko neldu jaabu maa…
validation_tutor_err_network: Wawaa heɓugo ekkitinoowo AI on — ndaaru jokkondiral maa salla nattiraa.
validation_tutor_err_429: Ekkitinoowo AI ɗon occupi — sabbu seeda nattiraa.
validation_tutor_err_auth: Ekkitinoowo AI: Matsalar API key. Ndaaru kalfinaaji janngirde.
validation_tutor_err_404: Ekkitinoowo AI: model tawaaka. Jokku e bayyinoowo janngirde nden.
validation_tutor_err_500: Ekkitinoowo AI: kuskure server — nattiru ɓaawo seeda.
validation_tutor_err_unknown: Ekkitinoowo AI: huunde yahi bee kuskure — nattiru.
validation_lv_stuck_hint: No wa'i bana a ronkii. Ndaa wallitaare:
validation_lv_stuck_no_hint: No wa'i bana a ronkii. Fuɗɗu bee ko aaya on nannini ma, ko a nani, ko ko a ƴami — koo nde a tana lannini jaabu on.
validation_lv_too_short: Ɗum fuɗɗoode — ammaa a waway winndugo seeda dow? Koo bolle gootel ko ɗiɗi wallitan ma faamuugo ƴamol on sanne.
validation_lv_repeats_question: No wa'i bana jaabu maa ɗon nattira ƴamol on. Winndu miijo on bee bolle maa.
validation_lv_repeats_passage: No wa'i bana jaabu maa ɗon nattira aaya on. Jaabu ƴamol on diga aaya on, bee bolle maa.
validation_lv_off_topic_hint: Jaabu maa no wa'i bana ɗon yaha feere diga ko ƴamol on ƴami (salla a woodi laawol feere ngol a wolwirta).
validation_lv_off_topic_no_hint: Jaabu maa no wa'i bana ɗon yaha feere diga ko ƴamol on ƴami. Jangitu ƴamol on bee hakkilo: Ɗume on nufi?
validation_lv_pass_thematic: No woodi. Jaabu maa ɗon jokki e ƴamol on — jokku.
validation_lv_pass_no_sample_no_hint: Jaabu maa heɓi ndaaru tawaangal. Ƴamol ngol walaa bayyanaaji jigo (thematic data), ngam majjum walaa ndaaru mawnungal waɗaama.
